summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI-based landing page builder. All core features working correctly including JSON upload, AI generation, and builder functionality.

design_issues.issue: WASM module fails to load, falling back to JS reducer
design_issues.details: Console shows 'Failed to load module script' for /wasm/ffb_canvas_engine.js but fallback works correctly

design_issues.issue: Color value '#333' does not conform to required format
design_issues.details: Console warning about color format, but functionality works

passed_tests: Backend error handling for missing/empty prompts
Frontend 'Upload Landing Page JSON' button visible and functional
Frontend 'Generate Landing Page' button visible and functional
Frontend form fields (page type, audience, product name, description) accessible
JSON upload flow: sample-page.json successfully imported
JSON conversion: Zoho hierarchical format converted to flat free-flow elements
Builder page navigation after JSON upload
Builder canvas loads with imported sections (5 sections, 28 elements)
Element selectability: clicking elements works correctly
Properties panel appears when elements are selected
AI generation flow: prompt submission and processing
AI generation: successful page creation (5 sections, 18 elements)
